title: TimeseriesAgg
content:
# TimeseriesAgg

Performs mathematical calculations on the Time Series values and returns the calculated results only. Depending on enumerator used `time_bucket` may also be required.

## Enum Values

- `none`
- `count`
- `distinct`
- `integral`
- `mean`
- `median`
- `mode`
- `spread`
- `stddev`
- `sum`
- `max`
- `min`
- `first`
- `last`
summary: Performs mathematical calculations on the Time Series values and returns the calculated results only. Depending on enumerator used `time_bucket` may also be required.
